title: Hypixel Housing GUI Clarity
description: A pack was designed to improve the readability of the Housing GUI elements
body:
# Housing GUI Clarity

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cj2eeelw/images/6c5d5abbb23dee5570cfb11a393144f2eb658bbe.png)


Housing GUI Clarity was designed to improve the readability of the Housing GUI elements, which can make your gaming experience easier as a designer and even as a player!

The pack has a simplistic style that aims to make the interface clearer and easier to understand (and to draw too but shh 😅)
I want to make it clear that I'm not really a pixel art artist...
So, if there are a lot of textures that are not great, it's a bit normal
But I will try to improve them from time to time!

I'm very proud to release this pack because the development of this one was not easy...
With more than 350 elements to modify and a difficult conversion to 1.8 it represents several weeks of work (I ended up making a small script 😤).

So I hope you will enjoy this pack and that it will improve your game experience !

Don't hesitate to let me know what you think about it! All feedbacks are welcome!

If you want to help me or just see the progress or even just discuss come to my discord ^^ -> https://discord.gg/4rt5bXfFuc
